scripts.start: concurrently "cd ./back && npm run server" "cd ./front && npm start"
scripts.docker:push: docker tag carrsh-image:latest philipsung/carrsh-image:latest && docker push philipsung/carrsh-image:latest
scripts.kube:secrets: kubectl create secret generic carrsh-back-env --from-env-file=back/.env.production --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
scripts.kube:deploy: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:push && kubectl apply -f k8s/carrsh-back-deployment.yaml && kubectl apply -f k8s/carrsh-back-service.yaml && kubectl rollout restart deployment carrsh-back-deployment
